To unify the Critical Hit DMG conversion mechanic, the following Effects have been adjusted so that the team Crit. DMG they grant is only affected by the applier's base Crit. DMG, and is no longer affected by in-run Crit. DMG Bonus. As compensation, these Effects have also been buffed accordingly.
    ○ Awakener "Castor": Skill "Umbral Flight" — the Crit. DMG gained by other Awakeners from this Skill is adjusted from 15% of Castor's Crit. DMG to a fixed value of 35%.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Power of the Pious": Crit. DMG gained is now increased from 9/11/13/15% to 11/14/17/20%, but is only affected by the wielder's base Crit. DMG.
● The combat sound effects for Awakeners "Sorel" and "Tawil" now have a stronger Strike feel.
